title: Finite Conditional Expectation Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite conditional-expectation bad high-block, total-expectation, tower-property, and variance-decomposition QF_LRA/Farkas regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Malformed finite conditioning rows where exact replay computes the high-block weighted average as 6 but the row claims high_block_expectation = 5, where total-expectation replay computes E[X]=E[E[X|G]]=7/2 but the row claims 4, where nested-partition tower replay computes 7/2 but the row claims 4, and where conditional-variance replay computes Var(X)=35/4 but the row claims 9.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional total-expectation, stopping-time, conditional-distribution, or conditional-moment rows only when they add distinct exact-linear solver pressure; keep Radon-Nikodym construction, stopping-time theorems, and regular conditional probabilities in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite conditioning sigma-algebras as partitions of probability atoms.
Replay finite conditional expectations, total expectation, tower-property, and conditional-variance-decomposition witnesses by exact rational model evaluation.
Route false finite conditional-expectation, total-expectation, tower-property, and variance-decomposition tables through checked QF_LRA/Farkas certificates when the contradiction is linear.
Keep general conditional expectation, Radon-Nikodym construction, martingales, stopping times, and regular conditional probabilities marked Lean-horizon until no-sorry Lean artifacts exist.
